Common page structures built from Layout: Common page structures built from Layout compounds.
Compose page shells with Layout, LayoutH: Compose page shells with Layout, LayoutHeader, LayoutSider, LayoutContent, and LayoutFooter. Nest Layouts for row/column regions. Pair with Sidebar for rich navigation, or DataOS ApplicationHeader and DataOsSidebar for product shells.
Compose with Sidebar for rich nav, or Da: Compose with Sidebar for rich nav, or DataOS ApplicationHeader / DataOsSidebar for product shells.

Generic SidebarProvider + Sidebar inside: Generic SidebarProvider + Sidebar inside a Layout shell.
Handling the overall layout of a page.
Layout: force horizontal (row) direction: Layout: force horizontal (row) direction when a Sider is present. Useful for SSR; otherwise Layout detects mounted LayoutSider children.
LayoutHeader, LayoutFooter, and LayoutCo: LayoutHeader, LayoutFooter, and LayoutContent accept standard HTML attributes plus className. For menus, cookies, and mobile drawers, nest Sidebar or use DataOsSidebar — LayoutSider is structural chrome only.
LayoutSider supports collapsed, collapsi: LayoutSider supports collapsed, collapsible, width, collapsedWidth, and custom trigger.
LayoutSider: called when the trigger tog: LayoutSider: called when the trigger toggles collapse.
LayoutSider: custom trigger. Omit for th: LayoutSider: custom trigger. Omit for the default icon button. Pass null to hide the trigger.
LayoutSider: expanded width (px number o: LayoutSider: expanded width (px number or CSS length).
LayoutSider: initial collapsed state whe: LayoutSider: initial collapsed state when uncontrolled.
LayoutSider: show a collapse trigger (de: LayoutSider: show a collapse trigger (default or custom).
LayoutSider: which edge the sider attach: LayoutSider: which edge the sider attaches to.
Left navigation column and main content: Left navigation column and main content only.
Mix full-width headers with side navigat: Mix full-width headers with side navigation columns
Nest a horizontal Layout (hasSider) betw: Nest a horizontal Layout (hasSider) between Header and Footer for the classic app chrome.
Nested Layouts for row (hasSider) and co: Nested Layouts for row (hasSider) and column regions.
Product shells nest DataOS blocks in Lay: Product shells nest DataOS blocks in Layout regions. See Application Header and DataOS Sidebar docs.
Sider spans the full height; header sits: Sider spans the full height; header sits in the content column.
Top and bottom chrome with a flexible co: Top and bottom chrome with a flexible content area.
Use the sidebar primitive for menus, coo: Use the sidebar primitive for menus, cookies, and mobile sheet behavior. Layout supplies header/content chrome. See /components/sidebar.
